posts.author: Akshay_M (Akshay Mahadik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2022-08-23 at 13.03.54970×774 74.9 KB

The attached screenshot is just an example, while creating a graph, X axis column Type used is connect boards.
I am not able to drill down when I click on 1. In ideal case, if I click on 1 it should give me data inside 1. but I am not able to do so. When I click on the 1, it doesn’t drill down (nothing happens).

Please help and guide.
